TimeEntry.Title: MYREMOTE issue Joanne Pagliarulo
TimeEntry.Notes: I received a call from the user, Joanne, who was unable to access her office computer through MyRemote. I remotely accessed her home computer to investigate the issue

TimeEntry.Notes: I logged into the ManageEngine portal and discovered that the agents on machines BWLAP-19 were not communicating with the portal. I then connected to the machines and attempted to restart the service,

TimeEntry.Title: Brett invited you to Otter (brandywine-homes.com) to collaborate on La Verne - Due Diligence

TimeEntry.Title: Nancy needs a printer set up at their onsite location on Thursday
TimeEntry.Notes: Call with Nancy to discuss what she needs onsite. Scheduled site visit tomorrow to verify network connection. Will go out on Thursday to complete the installation.

TimeEntry.Title: Pon's PC creates .txt files when saving as PDF

Login to the Cicso umbrella portal and found that the agent is not comunicating with the machine (BWH-HQ-IIS-01) and its showing offline.

So login to the server and reisntall the agent again

TimeEntry.Notes: As per the user's request, connect with the user to check the OneDrive sync issue. Investigate and resync the file, then verify if the problem has been resolved. Hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Brandywine-homes.com is down
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked website from my PC and everything was working. Logged into PC at customer location and found that the website was inaccessible. Hamid checked DNS server and found removed a broken DNS record.
